caption: The video appears to be a screen recording of an IRS webpage discussing Required Minimum Distributions (RMDs) for IRAs, retirement plan accounts, and inherited Roth IRAs. The page provides information on how beneficiaries can handle RMDs from inherited accounts and mentions relevant resources like "Retirement Topics - Beneficiary" and Publication 559. It also highlights a special provision related to the 2020 coronavirus pandemic, where RMDs were waived, allowing account owners or beneficiaries who received an RMD in 2020 to return it to their IRA or qualified plan to avoid taxes. The video likely serves as an informational guide for individuals navigating these financial regulations during the pandemic.
